name.full: Silent Escalation Copilot — Enterprise Risk Detection Agent

description.short: Detect hidden business risks and generate executive escalation drafts.
description.full: Silent Escalation Copilot is a Microsoft 365 Copilot declarative agent that analyzes emails, Teams messages, documents, and tasks to identify unescalated business risks. It generates structured risk summaries and ready-to-send executive escalation drafts.
